purpose: Fast, constrained Codex startup for Granny's House Trials and the broader ancient-infrastructure game work.

notes: Prefer the compact AGENT_CONTEXT.json for agent startup.
Do not load broad docs unless a task needs them.
Do not expand into unrelated experiments by default.
Prefer WSL/bash-native shells for repo inspection, build, and test work when available on this machine.
Use Windows shells only when the task requires Windows-native behavior or the tool is Windows-only.
Check transactions before making structured repository changes.

mission: Prove that a small, agent-friendly yard scenario can reveal hidden infrastructure, record meaningful evidence, and support a real drainage/repair round without losing the larger world-first identity.
